text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking down the hallway, I spot Kawakami
Princess overcome with grief.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ughh! My princess face! How?! This shouldn't be
possible!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Listen to this, Trainer! Yesterday, I wanted to do
some skin care, so I tried using a cucumber
mask...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And a mud mask, and a tea mask, and a honey
mask all at once! But my skin! It's gone all rough!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Shouldn't all aspects of a princess be strong and noble? How could my face fall into such a disgraceful state?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It turns out that Kawakami Princess is feeling
down because of her skin problems.
